title: Smoky Chicken Tagine
description: A North African-inspired stew made with smoky chicken, algerian spices, and a hint of tamarind. This dish is perfect for a cozy dinner with family and friends.

ingredients.name: Algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add spice blend, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add tamarind paste and smoky molasses. Stir to combine.
Add 1 cup water to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in chopped parsley and serve hot.
